subject: usb: dwc3: pci: prevent memory leak in dwc3_pci_probe
notes: POC built on first try; verifier needed a buggy-only slice (poc-for-verifier.c) to match seed-slice whole-file counts (same scaffolding lin-1-rep1/rep2 used).
First query revision compiled but fired on multiple false locations (early returns before acquisition, plus the happy-path tail return).

Second revision tightened the pattern: require sibling good `goto err` and bad direct `return` IfStmts both occurring after the acquisition, with the bad-if condition not testing the acquired or any freshly-assigned pointer (filters out !ptr null-checks).
Final query produces 1 result inside dwc3_pci_probe-like _buggy at the BUG return; zero results inside _fixed.
Query is generic: no hard-coded function or file names; runs against the full Linux DB.
